title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Pudding, Nami, Luffy as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A... S- sorry, but, after looking at it up close for the first time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just couldn't help but be drawn to it.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: What are you doing?! quit dawdling, pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell is this idiot saying?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me?! Never once, since the day I was born...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a single time! No one has ever called this eye "beautiful"!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: What's going on, pudding! Shoot him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You might be my child, but you sure are creepy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look at her! She's a three- eye!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll erase you all! Every last

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just shut up and let you laugh at me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Goddann it... I gotta kill him! I gotta kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm just an ugly, three-eyed monster!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Oi! What happened to the plan, pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Crap! too late! You do it, Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's no use!He's gonna dodge with?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's the gunshot! That's the signal, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! Wait! He's the one that's been shot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What in the world is happening?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
